claims.text: Remote workers reported 23% higher job satisfaction than office-based workers in the same roles.
claims.source: National Workplace Survey 2025, conducted by the Institute for Employment Research. Published June 2025. Available at institute-website.org/data.

claims.text: The productivity gap between remote and office workers was 4.2 percentage points — but this narrows to 1.1 points when controlling for job type.
claims.source: Same survey. The 4.2-point figure is from the dataset. The 1.1-point controlled figure was calculated by the journalist using regression analysis on the raw survey data.

claims.text: Companies with hybrid policies retained 91% of staff, compared to 84% for fully in-office companies.
claims.source: Corporate HR Analytics Report, published by Workforce Insights Ltd, March 2025. Figures taken directly from the executive summary.

claims.text: The city spent 12.4 million on road repairs in 2025.
claims.source: City Budget Office annual report, FY2025. Direct figure from page 34.

claims.text: Press freedom scores declined in 14 of 27 EU member states between 2023 and 2025.
claims.source: European Press Freedom Index, published annually by the European Journalism Centre. 2023 and 2025 editions. Available at ejc.net/index.

claims.text: Hungary's press freedom score of 54.6 is the lowest in the EU, down from 61.2 in 2020.
claims.source: Same index, 2020 and 2025 editions. Figures taken directly.

claims.text: The average EU press freedom score fell from 76.8 to 73.1 between 2020 and 2025 — a decline of 4.8%.
claims.source: Same index. The averages are calculated by the journalist as unweighted means of all 27 member state scores. Percentage decline calculated as ((73.1 - 76.8) / 76.8) x 100.
